title: TradePreview
description: 🔎 Check villager's trades without opening their inventory
body:
Check all the trades a villager has to offer from the press of a key without having to open their inventory, all of this with a highly configurable overlay!

- You can move around the overlay by pressing the assigned key (M by default)
- You can scroll through the offered enchanted items with the assigned keys (UP and DOWN arrow by default) or use the scroll wheel!
- Enchanted books have their names displayed automatically, removing the need to scroll through them
- You can change the colours used (container and enchanted item selection) from the configs screen

All of the keys can be configured in the options menu

Currently only available for the **Fabric ModLoader**  
Requires [Chassis](https://modrinth.com/mod/chassis)
